svg.style: background: #ffffff; background-color: light-dark(#ffffff, var(--ge-dark-color, #121212)); color-scheme: light dark;

<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" agent="5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/87.0.4280.88 Safari/537.36" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram id="YLvKhEjZ6zkABejfBttA" name="Page-1"> <mxGraphModel dx="2762" dy="2212" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="827" pageHeight="1169" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="4tH3ARZS2R-7xafz_0eO-1" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;align=left;" value="<div><span style="background-color: rgb(255 , 255 , 255) ; color: rgb(51 , 51 , 51) ; font-family: &#34;open sans&#34; , sans-serif ; font-size: 16px">Destructuring assignment allows you to assign the properties of an array or object to variables using syntax that looks similar to array or object literals.</span></div><span style="color: rgb(51 , 51 , 51) ; font-family: &#34;open sans&#34; , sans-serif ; font-size: 16px ; background-color: rgb(255 , 255 , 255)"><div>With destructuring assignment, the equivalent code becomes more concise and readable:</div></span>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="660" x="80" y="80" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="4tH3ARZS2R-7xafz_0eO-2" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;gradientColor=#ffffff;sketch=0;shadow=0;glass=0;" value="

<h3 style="box-sizing: border-box; font-family: &quot;open sans&quot;, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; margin: 2.2rem 0px 0.8rem; line-height: 1.2; font-size: 1.2rem; color: rgb(51, 51, 51); font-style: normal; letter-spacing: normal; text-align: left; text-indent: 0px; text-transform: none; word-spacing: 0px; background-color: rgb(255, 255, 255);">Destructuring<span>&nbsp;</span></h3>

" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="50" width="166" x="334" y="30" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="4tH3ARZS2R-7xafz_0eO-4" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;shadow=0;glass=0;sketch=0;strokeColor=#d6b656;gradientColor=#ffd966;fillColor=#fff2cc;" value="<font style="font-size: 15px">Array Destructuring</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="140" x="-130" y="200" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="4tH3ARZS2R-7xafz_0eO-5" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;shadow=0;glass=0;sketch=0;strokeColor=#82b366;gradientColor=#97d077;fillColor=#d5e8d4;" value="<font style="font-size: 15px">Object Destructuring</font>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="40" width="140" x="760" y="200" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="4tH3ARZS2R-7xafz_0eO-10" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;shadow=0;glass=0;sketch=0;strokeColor=#36393d;align=left;fillColor=#cce5ff;" value="<div><b>const restaurant = {</b></div><div><b>&nbsp; name: 'Classico Italiano',</b></div><div><b>&nbsp; location: 'Via Angelo Tavanti 23, Firenze, Italy',</b></div><div><b>&nbsp; categories: ['Italian', 'Pizzeria', 'Vegetarian', 'Organic'],</b></div><div><b>&nbsp; starterMenu: ['Focaccia', 'Bruschetta', 'Garlic Bread', 'Caprese Salad'],</b></div><div><b>&nbsp; mainMenu: ['Pizza', 'Pasta', 'Risotto'],</b></div><div><b><br></b></div><div><div><b>order(starterIndex, mainIndex) {</b></div><div><b>&nbsp; &nbsp; return [this.starterMenu[starterIndex], this.mainMenu[mainIndex]];</b></div><div><b>&nbsp; },</b></div><div><b><br></b></div><div><b>&nbsp; orderDelivery({ starterIndex = 1, mainIndex = 0, time = '20:00', address }) {</b></div><div><b>&nbsp; &nbsp; console.log(<span>`Order received! ${this.starterMenu[starterIndex]} and ${this.mainMenu[mainIndex]} will be delivered to ${address} at ${time}`</span></b></div><div><b>&nbsp; &nbsp; );</b></div><div><b>&nbsp; },</b></div></div><div><div><b>openingHours = {</b></div><div><b>&nbsp; [weekdays[3]]: {</b></div><div><b>&nbsp; &nbsp; open: 12,</b></div><div><b>&nbsp; &nbsp; close: 22,</b></div><div><b>&nbsp; },</b></div><div><b>&nbsp; [weekdays[4]]: {</b></div><div><b>&nbsp; &nbsp; open: 11,</b></div><div><b>&nbsp; &nbsp; close: 23,</b></div><div><b>&nbsp; },</b></div><div><b>&nbsp; [weekdays[5]]: {</b></div><div><b>&nbsp; &nbsp; open: 0, // Open 24 hours</b></div><div><b>&nbsp; &nbsp; close: 24,</b></div><div><b>&nbsp; },</b></div><div><b>};</b></div></div><div><b>};</b></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="550" width="430" x="160" y="200" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="4tH3ARZS2R-7xafz_0eO-14" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;shadow=0;glass=0;sketch=0;strokeColor=#d6b656;fillColor=#fff2cc;gradientColor=#ffd966;" value="<div><b>With Destructuring</b></div><div><b>const [x,y,z] = arr;</b></div><div><b>console.log(x,y,z);</b></div><div><b>console.log(arr)</b></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="290" x="-200" y="380" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="4tH3ARZS2R-7xafz_0eO-15" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;shadow=0;glass=0;sketch=0;strokeColor=#d6b656;gradientColor=#ffd966;fillColor=#fff2cc;align=left;" value="<div><b>const [first,second] = restaurent.categories;</b></div><div><b>console.log(first,second)</b></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="300" x="-200" y="450" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="4tH3ARZS2R-7xafz_0eO-16" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;shadow=0;glass=0;sketch=0;strokeColor=#d6b656;gradientColor=#ffd966;fillColor=#fff2cc;align=left;" value="<div><b>Without Destructuring</b></div><div><b>const arr = [2,3,4];</b></div><div><b>const a = arr[0];</b></div><div><b>const b = arr[1];</b></div><div><b>const c = arr[2]</b></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="290" x="-200" y="280" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="4tH3ARZS2R-7xafz_0eO-18" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;shadow=0;glass=0;sketch=0;strokeColor=#d6b656;gradientColor=#ffd966;fillColor=#fff2cc;align=left;" value="<b>Skipping an element <br>let [main, ,secondary] = restaurant.categories;<br>console.log(main,secondary)</b>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="80" width="300" x="-200" y="520" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="4tH3ARZS2R-7xafz_0eO-19" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;shadow=0;glass=0;sketch=0;strokeColor=#d6b656;gradientColor=#ffd966;fillColor=#fff2cc;align=left;" value="<b>Receive two return value from a function <br>const [starter,mainCourse] = restaurant.order[2,0];<br>console.log(starter,mainCourse);</b>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="300" x="-200" y="610" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="4tH3ARZS2R-7xafz_0eO-20" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;shadow=0;glass=0;sketch=0;strokeColor=#d6b656;gradientColor=#ffd966;fillColor=#fff2cc;align=left;" value="<b>Nested array Destructring<br>const nested = [2,4, [5,6]];<br>const [i, ,[j,k]] = nested;<br>console.log(i,j,k)</b>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="300" x="-200" y="690" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> value="<b>Default values<br>const [p=1,q=1,r=1] = [8,9];<br>console.log(p,q,r);</b>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="295" x="-200" y="760" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;shadow=0;glass=0;sketch=0;strokeColor=#82b366;gradientColor=#97d077;fillColor=#d5e8d4;align=left;" value="<div><b>const {name, openingHours,categories} = restaurent;</b></div><div><b>console.log(name,openingHours,categories)</b></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="330" x="640" y="280" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="4tH3ARZS2R-7xafz_0eO-32" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;shadow=0;glass=0;sketch=0;strokeColor=#82b366;gradientColor=#97d077;fillColor=#d5e8d4;align=left;" value="<div><b>const {</b></div><div><b>name: restaurantName,</b></div><div><b>openingHours: hours,</b></div><div><b>categories:tags</b></div><div><b>} = restaurent;</b></div><div><b>console.log(restaurantName,hours,tags)</b></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="90" width="330" x="640" y="360" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="4tH3ARZS2R-7xafz_0eO-33" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;shadow=0;glass=0;sketch=0;strokeColor=#82b366;gradientColor=#97d077;fillColor=#d5e8d4;align=left;" value="<div><b>Default Value</b></div><div><b>const {menu = [], starterMenu: starter = [] } = restaurant;</b></div><div><b>console.log(menu, starter);</b></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="60" width="330" x="640" y="460" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="4tH3ARZS2R-7xafz_0eO-34" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;shadow=0;glass=0;sketch=0;strokeColor=#82b366;gradientColor=#97d077;fillColor=#d5e8d4;align=left;" value="<div><b>Mutating Variable</b></div><div><b>let a = 111;</b></div><div><b>let b = 525;</b></div><div><b>const obj = {a:23,b:7,c:14};</b></div><div><b>({a,b} = obj});</b></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="100" width="330" x="640" y="535" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="4tH3ARZS2R-7xafz_0eO-35" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;shadow=0;glass=0;sketch=0;strokeColor=#82b366;gradientColor=#97d077;fillColor=#d5e8d4;align=left;" value="<div><b>Nested Objects</b></div><div><b>const {fri} = openingHours;</b></div><div><b>console.log(fri);</b></div><div><b><br></b></div><div><b>const {</b></div><div><b>fri: {open, close},</b></div><div><b>} = openingHours;</b></div><div><b>console.log(open,close);</b></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="130" width="330" x="640" y="655" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="4tH3ARZS2R-7xafz_0eO-36" parent="1" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;shadow=0;glass=0;sketch=0;strokeColor=#82b366;gradientColor=#97d077;fillColor=#d5e8d4;align=left;" value="<div><b>calling function</b></div><div><b>restaurant.orderDelivery({</b></div><div><b>time: '22:30',</b></div><div><b>address: 'Ashok Garden Gurgaon',</b></div><div><b>mainIndex: 2,</b></div><div><b>starterIndex: 2,</b></div><div><b>});</b></div><div><b><br></b></div><div><b>calling function when default value is passed</b></div><div><b>restaurant.orderDelivery({</b></div><div><b>address: 'Ashok Garden Gurgaon',</b></div><div><b>starterIndex: 2,</b></div><div><b>});</b></div><div><br></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="200" width="330" x="640" y="810" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(218, 232, 252), rgb(29, 41, 59)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(108, 142, 191), rgb(92, 121, 163));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 658px; height: 1px; padding-top: 129px; margin-left: 282px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

span.style: background-color: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18)); color: light-dark(rgb(51, 51, 51), rgb(193, 193, 193)); font-family: "open sans", sans-serif; font-size: 16px;

div.span: Destructuring assignment allows you to assign the properties of an array or object to variables using syntax that looks similar to array or object literals.

span.style: color: light-dark(rgb(51, 51, 51), rgb(193, 193, 193)); font-family: "open sans", sans-serif; font-size: 16px; background-color: light-dark(rgb(255, 255, 255), rgb(18, 18, 18));
span.div: With destructuring assignment, the equivalent code becomes more concise and readable:
